title: nymphaea × rosea
intro: Nymphaea × rosea, also known as the rose water lily, is a hybrid aquatic plant that belongs to the water lily family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and relieving symptoms of menopause. The herbal preparations of Nymphaea × rosea typically involve extracting its essential oil, which can be used in aromatherapy or applied topically to the skin, or used in teas and infusions for its medicinal properties.
